hero.title: Manage Intern Attendance Digitally
hero.description: A modern attendance platform for Diskominfo Kota Makassar. Track attendance, manage schedules, and generate reports — all in one integrated system.

features.sectionTitle: Everything You Need for Attendance Management
features.sectionDescription: Designed to simplify administration and improve accountability of intern attendance.

faceRecognition.title: Face Verification
faceRecognition.description: Real-time facial recognition technology to ensure the authenticity of each attendance record.

locationTracking.title: Location Validation
locationTracking.description: Automatic geofencing checks to verify that attendance is recorded within the office area.

scheduling.title: Flexible Scheduling
scheduling.description: Manage attendance schedules per agency with easily customizable days and time slots.

reporting.title: Reports & Export
reporting.description: Generate comprehensive attendance reports and export data to Excel format with a single click.

multiRole.title: Multi Role Access
multiRole.description: Superadmin, Agency Admin, and Intern role system with controlled and secure access levels.

realtime.title: Real-time Monitoring
realtime.description: Live attendance monitoring dashboard with present, late, and absent status tracking.

howItWorks.sectionDescription: A streamlined attendance process from start to finish.

step1.title: Register & Login
step1.description: Create an account or sign in to the portal with your registered credentials.

step2.title: Record Attendance
step2.description: Submit attendance with face verification and location check based on the assigned schedule.

step3.title: Monitor & Report
step3.description: Admins can monitor attendance in real-time and download reports anytime.

footer.description: Integrated digital attendance system for interns of Makassar City Government.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Diskominfo Kota Makassar. All rights reserved.
footer.contactAddress: Gedung MGC Lt. 7 Jl Sultan Hasanuddin Kota Makassar 90171

signIn.subtitle: Enter your credentials to continue
signIn.heroDescription: Please sign in to record your attendance. This system is integrated with the office network to ensure attendance validity.

signUp.subtitle: Join our attendance system
signUp.name: Full Name
signUp.heroDescription: Register to get started with our attendance system.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Choose how you want to recover your account
forgotPassword.checkEmail: Please check your email for the recovery message. The link or code will expire shortly.
forgotPassword.emailMethodDescription: Receive a secure reset link in your inbox
forgotPassword.otpMethodDescription: Receive a one-time code and continue immediately
forgotPassword.chooseMethodPrompt: Select a recovery method to continue
forgotPassword.heroDescription: Please sign in to record your attendance. This system is integrated with the office network to ensure attendance validity.

resetPassword.title: Create New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below
resetPassword.otpTitle: Verify OTP and Create New Password
resetPassword.otpSubtitle: Enter the code sent to your email, then set a new password
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been successfully reset. Redirecting to sign in page...
resetPassword.redirecting: Redirecting to sign in page in a moment...
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.failedToReset: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
resetPassword.errorOccurred: An error occurred. Please try again.
resetPassword.heroDescription: Please sign in to record your attendance. This system is integrated with the office network to ensure attendance validity.

admin.agenciesDescription: Manage and monitor all government agencies in the system.

profile.deleteAccountDialogDescription: This action will permanently remove your account and cannot be undone. Type DELETE to confirm.
